title: Documentation, APIs, Licenses, and Generated-Artifact Gates · Repository Template Mission
summary: A systems tools team. The team needs a native CLI repo with warnings, tests, fuzz-ready boundaries, sanitizers, documentation, and release evidence. Planned artifact: Deliver Sanitized Native CLI Template with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use AddressSanitizer builds to detect memory safety defects in native code.
Use UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer with appropriate recover or trap policy.
Run expensive dynamic checks in a documented matrix with symbolized actionable output.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.
